# Little Fight NYC

> Right-sized digital systems for New York businesses.

Little Fight NYC helps small and mid-sized New York businesses build better websites, choose smarter software, improve local visibility, and create workflows that fit the way the business actually works.

## Core Promise

Keep what works. Connect what matters. Replace what drags. Build what fits.

## What We Do

- Business System Fit Checks across website clarity, software stack, local visibility, and workflows.
- Small business websites, service pages, landing pages, e-commerce, booking paths, and conversion flows.
- Business systems including intake, lead tracking, dashboards, automations, and lightweight internal tools.
- Local SEO and AEO for Google Business Profile, Maps visibility, reviews, FAQs, schema, and analytics.
- Software stack review, tool selection, integrations, and practical support for New York businesses.

## Who We Serve

Owner-operated businesses and teams under 50 across Manhattan and New York City, including restaurants, bars, salons, wellness studios, shops, galleries, creative studios, professional services, practices, and local brands.

## Software Guides

- Square vs Toast for Manhattan bars and restaurants: https://littlefightnyc.com/software-guides/square-vs-toast-manhattan-restaurants/
- Square Appointments vs GlossGenius for NYC salons: https://littlefightnyc.com/software-guides/square-appointments-vs-glossgenius-nyc-salons/
- Webflow vs Squarespace for Manhattan small businesses: https://littlefightnyc.com/software-guides/webflow-vs-squarespace-manhattan-small-business/
- Shopify vs Squarespace for NYC retail: https://littlefightnyc.com/software-guides/shopify-vs-squarespace-nyc-retail/
- Airtable vs Notion vs Monday for small business operations: https://littlefightnyc.com/software-guides/airtable-vs-notion-vs-monday-small-business/
- Custom business systems vs SaaS subscriptions: https://littlefightnyc.com/software-guides/custom-business-system-vs-saas-subscriptions/

## Technology

Static HTML/CSS/JS website with Three.js interactive hero, Netlify delivery, LocalBusiness schema, visible FAQs, Article and FAQ schema for guides, and Netlify Forms intake.
